headline: Why Accenture (ACN) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of global professional services company Accenture (NYSE:ACN) fell 7.6% in the afternoon session after It extended its post-earnings selloff that erased nearly a quarter of the company's value in under a week.

content.title: Why Accenture (ACN) Stock Is Down Today
content.summary: Shares of global professional services company Accenture (NYSE:ACN) fell 7.6% in the afternoon session after It extended its post-earnings selloff that erased nearly a quarter of the company's value in under a week.

headline: Is Accenture (ACN) Sacrificing Near-Term Growth To Reinvent Its Consulting Model Around AI And Cloud?
summary: Accenture’s latest fiscal third-quarter report showed past quarterly sales of US$18.72 billion and net income of US$2.34 billion, but management cut full-year revenue growth guidance and highlighted delayed client deals alongside weaker bookings. At the same time, Accenture has been deepening its role in AI- and cloud-enabled transformations, such as INFRONEER’s rapid SAP Cloud ERP rollout and Unilever’s AI digital twin expansion, underscoring how the company is helping large clients rebuild...

content.title: Is Accenture (ACN) Sacrificing Near-Term Growth To Reinvent Its Consulting Model Around AI And Cloud?
content.summary: Accenture’s latest fiscal third-quarter report showed past quarterly sales of US$18.72 billion and net income of US$2.34 billion, but management cut full-year revenue growth guidance and highlighted delayed client deals alongside weaker bookings. At the same time, Accenture has been deepening its role in AI- and cloud-enabled transformations, such as INFRONEER’s rapid SAP Cloud ERP rollout and Unilever’s AI digital twin expansion, underscoring how the company is helping large clients rebuild...

headline: Accenture Expands Share Repurchase Plan by $2 Billion as Confidence in AI Positioning Grows (ACN)
summary: Stock Gains After Enhanced Capital Return CommitmentAccenture (NYSE:ACN) shares moved 2% higher on Tuesday after the consulting and technology services group announced a significant expansion of its fiscal 2026 share repurchase programme. The company increased its planned buyback allocation by $2 billion, reinforcing its commitment to returning capital to shareholders while highlighting confidence in its long-term growth prospects.

content.title: Accenture Expands Share Repurchase Plan by $2 Billion as Confidence in AI Positioning Grows (ACN)
content.summary: Stock Gains After Enhanced Capital Return CommitmentAccenture (NYSE:ACN) shares moved 2% higher on Tuesday after the consulting and technology services group announced a significant expansion of its fiscal 2026 share repurchase programme. The company increased its planned buyback allocation by $2 billion, reinforcing its commitment to returning capital to shareholders while highlighting confidence in its long-term growth prospects.

headline: Accenture Launches Accenture Edge to Help Mid-Market Companies Harness AI and Reinvent How They Operate
summary: NEW YORK, June 23, 2026--Accenture today announced the launch of Accenture Edge, a new business designed to help mid-market companies harness AI.

content.title: Accenture Launches Accenture Edge to Help Mid-Market Companies Harness AI and Reinvent How They Operate
content.summary: NEW YORK, June 23, 2026--Accenture today announced the launch of Accenture Edge, a new business designed to help mid-market companies harness AI.

thumbnail.caption: Accenture today announced the launch of Accenture Edge, a new business designed to help mid-market companies with annual revenues between $300 million and $3 billion to harness AI and technology.
